mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item_claims ( order_item_id, status, reason, detail_reason ) VALUES ( #{order_item_id}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{detail_reason} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.claim_id, c.order_item_id, c.status, c.reason, c.seller_answer, c.requested_at, c.completed_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.detail_reason, oi.product_id, p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL, oi.price, oi.quantity FROM order_item_claims c JOIN order_items oi ON c.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.requested_at DESC
